title: LCSW - Fully Licensed
bio: Yaqueline Paredes is a fully licensed LCSW at Riaz Counseling, supporting clients with anxiety, depression, trauma and PTSD, relationship challenges, grief, life transitions, OCD, codependency, and concerns related to shame and guilt. Yaqueline’s primary areas of focus include anxiety, depression, and shame and guilt, while also working with individuals experiencing mood disorders. Yaqueline provides individual and family therapy services for adults (20–64) and older adults (65+), offering affirming care for LGBTQ+, bisexual, lesbian, transgender, and heterosexual clients. Drawing from evidence-based approaches including ACT, Attachment-Based Therapy, CBT, DBT, ERP, Psychodynamic Therapy, Person-Centered Therapy, and Trauma-Focused Therapy, Yaqueline creates a culturally sensitive and supportive environment that fosters healing, resilience, and personal growth.
